component.name: More Tweaks
component.summary: A GUI for hidden GNOME desktop tweaks and settings

description.p: More Tweaks exposes hundreds of hidden GNOME desktop settings that are not available in the standard Settings application. Toggle behaviors, adjust thresholds, manage lockdown policies, and fine-tune your desktop without touching the terminal.
The app includes a bundled GNOME Shell extension that enables custom window and notification animation profiles, with preset-based controls for duration, delay, and intensity.
Major feature update with 328 tweaks across 26 categories.

ul.li: 78 new tweaks across 7 new categories (Touchpad, Tiling, Top Bar, and 4 additional app categories)
Import and export all settings as JSON for backup and sharing
Reset all settings to defaults with confirmation dialog
Custom animation presets: clone, edit, and save your own presets
Per-application animation rules with WM_CLASS matching
Touchpad gesture section with 3-finger and 4-finger swipe controls
Tiling section with grid columns/rows, gap controls, and preview settings
Top bar panel reordering with drag-and-drop zone layout
Animation timeline visualization for preset timing
In-app animation preview widget
Interactive motion animations (move/resize start and stop)
New control types: color picker, font chooser, duration, dimensions, and time-of-day
Live detection of external settings changes via GSettings signals

description.p: Initial public release of More Tweaks.

ul.li: 250+ hidden GNOME desktop tweaks across 19 categories
Bundled GNOME Shell animation runtime with 57 presets and 5 curated profiles
Full-text search and category filtering
Native keyboard shortcut recorder for keybinding controls
Tabbed animation groups (System, Windows, Window States, etc.)
System animation timing overrides
About dialog, primary menu, and keyboard shortcuts
Global search across all categories
Adaptive sidebar layout with Adw.NavigationSplitView
Copy gsettings command button on each tweak
Per-tweak reset-to-default button
Drag-and-drop list editor for array settings
